items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Update on the Facilities Master Planning Process
Roosevelt Elementary School Presentation for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the November 20 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for Henry Ford School
Approval of Amendment No. 2 to the Agreement between Redwood City School District and One Life Counseling for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of 2024-2025 Certificated Seniority Report
Approval of 2024-2025 Classified Seniority Reports
Approval of the Student Instructional Calendar for the 2025-2026 School Year
Award of Bid to Supply Par Baked Pizza Products
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6153: School-Sponsored Trips
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4157: Employee Safety
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4161: Leaves
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4261: Leaves
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4113.4: Temporary Modified/Light Duty Assignment
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4213.4: Temporary Modified/Light-Duty Assignment
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4040: Employee Use of Technology
Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy 4113: Assignment
Ratification of Warrant Registers, November 1, 2024 - November 30, 2024
Approval of Membership to the Citizen's Oversight Committee for Measure U
Approval of Budget Renewal Initiative, Superintendent Recommendations
Adoption of Resolution No. 11, Reduction of Certain Classified Services for Fiscal Year 2024-2025
Adoption of Resolution No. 12, Reduction or Elimination of Certificated Services for Fiscal Year 2024-2025
Adoption of Resolution No. 13, Release and Reassignment of Certificated Administrator(s)
Adoption of Resolution No. 14, Determination of Order of Employment for Certificated Employees for Elimination of or Reductions in Particular Kinds of Services for Fiscal Year 2025-2026
Debrief on the 2024 California School Boards Association (CSBA) Annual Education Conference (AEC) and Trade Show
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - October 2024
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced during the early portion of the meeting. The board president asked "Do we have any changes to the agenda?" and received a motion to approve the agenda as posted with no modifications mentioned.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move to approve the agenda uh second all those in favor I thank you
